_doc: KARTA projektu drapek = jedyne zrodlo prawdy. Archetyp gadzet-handsPOV z ANIMAL-AS-PERFORMER (pies = odpowiednik twarzy: kanoniczny dog-ref warunkuje wszystkie sceny z psem, jak face-ref w beauty). Produkt: Drapek — deska do scierania pazurow psa z szuflada na smakolyki (Ali white-label). Tozsamosc WYLACZNIE z gallery_curated; marka PetSpany ze wzorca = forbidden.

product.anatomy_str: A flat rectangular dog claw-filing board, about 35 by 25 cm and 3 cm thick, with a solid pale natural pine-wood body and plain blonde wooden edges; the entire top face is covered in one coarse matte-black grippy abrasive scratch pad with a fine sandpaper/emery texture; at one end a small square treat compartment (a pale wooden well) is covered by a thin black-topped sliding lid that opens by pulling a short black fabric pull-loop at its corner; sliding the lid back reveals a few kibble treats resting in the pale wooden well; the blonde wood edges are completely plain and UNBRANDED with no text or logo
product.functional_count: exactly 1 flat board with 1 coarse black abrasive top + 1 sliding black-topped treat lid carrying 1 black fabric pull-loop + 1 pale wooden treat well - this exact set, identical in every scene, never more, never fewer
product.exactly_one: EXACTLY ONE scratch board in the scene and only ONE dog; a human hand appears only when the action needs it and holds only that one thing (metal clippers OR the black pull-loop OR nothing)
product._cv_reason: produkt = czarna powierzchnia scierna + jasne drewno (neutralny/czarny, maska HSV bezuzyteczna); pies tan/bialy koliduje z drewnem i skora dloni. Licznik egzemplarzy = VLM wiersz-na-klatke.
forbidden_leaks: PetSpany wordmark on the wood edge
any brand name or logo on the wood or board
grey patterned carpet from the reference

scenography.layout: one canonical bright airy home living-room floor: warm light-oak wood flooring or a soft cream/beige low-pile rug, a light neutral (cream/beige) sofa softly blurred in the background, tidy and clean; the scratch board lies flat on the floor in the front-center of frame
scenography.swiatlo: bright natural daytime window light, warm and clean, high-key, soft gentle shadows, cheerful cozy home mood - deliberately NOT the dark reference room

action_steps: a hand brings shiny metal nail clippers toward the dog's front paw; the dog pulls its paw back and turns its head away with ears pinned back (anxiety)
a hand sets the flat scratch board down on the floor in front of the curious dog
the dog drags a front paw DOWN and back across the coarse black abrasive top, claws scratching, digging motion, leaving pale scratch streaks on the black surface
a hand pulls the black loop and the black lid slides horizontally back, revealing kibble treats in the pale wooden well
the dog dips its nose into the open well and takes a treat
the dog rests a front paw calmly on the board
grammar.both_hands: only ONE human hand appears at a time and only in the clipper / board-placing / lid-sliding scenes; in the scratch and treat-eating scenes there is NO human hand in frame, only the dog; the dog scratches with its FRONT paws only (alternating), front legs on the board, hind legs on the floor
grammar.physics: the dog scratches with real canine paw mechanics - a front paw drags down and back across the flat board lying on the floor plane, claws contacting the black abrasive top; the sliding lid moves horizontally within the board plane and never lifts or floats; treats rest in the wooden well under gravity; the dog always has exactly four legs, four paws, one tail, two ears - never an extra limb or paw; clippers are gripped by human fingers, never floating; no full 360 spins, rigid board stays sharp

identity.dog_desc: one canonical tri-color Pembroke Welsh Corgi: tan/fawn face and legs, white chest, blaze and paws, a black saddle over the back, large upright pointed ears, short legs, fox-like face, dark friendly eyes, black nose, no collar - THE SAME individual dog in every scene

screens_and_text: no readable text, logos, brand names, wordmarks or captions anywhere; the blonde wood edge is plain with NO wordmark (scrub PetSpany); the treat well contains only plain brown kibble; wide illegible small text is fine, any legible glyph = reject
